## Tests

- [ ] `melos run format`
- [ ] `melos run analyze`
- [ ] `melos run validate`
- [ ] `melos run docs`
- [ ] `melos run test`
- [ ] `melos run examples`
- [ ] `melos run coverage`
- [ ] `melos run benchmark:smoke`
- [ ] `melos run publish:dry-run`

## Compatibility

- Binary/update compatibility impact:
- Fixture changes:

## Checklist

- [ ] Public APIs have dartdoc comments.
- [ ] New behavior has tests.
- [ ] Compatibility-sensitive behavior has fixtures.
- [ ] Performance-sensitive behavior has benchmarks or a rationale.
- [ ] Package code, docs, tests, and examples use package-native terminology.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior was reviewed privately before disclosure.
